name: Kid Apollo Final Art Pack Contract
importantBoundary: This folder is for commissioned or approved final assets. The _lookdev-inputs folder contains temporary sourced material only.

requiredDeliverables.label: Custom rocket GLB
requiredDeliverables.notes: Compact chrome toy rocket, Apollo-red fins, large amber porthole, brass ring, decals, light wear.

requiredDeliverables.label: Custom goat GLB
requiredDeliverables.notes: Small felted baby goat, off-white wool, bent ear, KA patch, protective glasses variant.

requiredDeliverables.label: Custom room blockout
requiredDeliverables.notes: Warm cutaway music-room layout with six link-object positions.

requiredDeliverables.label: Custom poster still
requiredDeliverables.notes: Polished still of the real world: rocket, goat, glowing porthole, physical labels, Listen primary.

requiredDeliverables.label: Optimised GLB exports
requiredDeliverables.notes: Final compressed/optimised GLBs for production testing.

requiredDeliverables.label: Compressed textures
requiredDeliverables.notes: Compressed final texture set for mobile performance.
